enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder: a friend named Bayward visited, bought him a latte and sandwich, and they filmed an interview video. Kyle also worked on a ski resorts of Colorado web project he expects to complete the following week, and mentions wanting to do more viewer request videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: proud of building it from scratch and staying on schedule
willing to experiment with longer format now that he has a better modem
wants to do more viewer request content
